ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of sensor (e.g., energy consumption, temperature) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the sensor is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last maintained */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_sensor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "sensor_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor type (e.g., kWh, degrees Celsius) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that generated the reading */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the reading */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for the reading (e.g., good, bad, unknown) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading associated with the metadata */,
  "gap" INTEGER /* Gap value */,
  "nor_value" REAL /* Normalized value */,
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Rank ID */,
  "daily_rank_id" INTEGER /* Daily rank ID */,
  "nor_daily" REAL /* Normalized daily value */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., manual entry, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_metadata_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES sensor_readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_summaries" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily summary */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor associated with the summary */,
  "thedate" TEXT /* Date of the summary */,
  "max_hour" INTEGER /* Maximum hour of the day */,
  "daily_count" INTEGER /* Daily count */,
  "eod_value" REAL /* End-of-day value */,
  "average_value" REAL /* Average value */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_summaries_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trend_smoothing" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading associated with the trend */,
  "trend_smoothing" REAL /* Trend smoothing value */,
  "window_size" INTEGER /* Window size for the trend smoothing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trend_smoothing_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES sensor_readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nds_wt_values" (
  "nds_wt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weighted value entry */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading associated with the weighted value */,
  "nds_wt_value" REAL /* Weighted value */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight used for the weighted value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nds_wt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nds_wt_values_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES sensor_readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nd_wt_values" (
  "nd_wt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each non-normalized weighted value entry */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading associated with the non-normalized weighted value */,
  "nd_wt_value" REAL /* Non-normalized weighted value */,
  "nd_wt_stdev" REAL /* Non-normalized weighted standard deviation */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight used for the non-normalized weighted value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nd_wt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nd_wt_values_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES sensor_readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, customer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor associated with the access */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sensor */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
